texto: They no longer wanted to entice anyone
autor: all they wanted was to catch a glimpse for as long as possible of the reflected glory in the great eyes of Odysseus
explicacao: Citação de all they wanted was to catch a glimpse for as long as possible of the reflected glory in the great eyes of Odysseus sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They no longer wanted to entice anyone” articula reflexao, franz-kafka, longer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
